name: The Low Hanging Fruit
effect: Identify and capture the easiest available wins. This card is considered impactful.

clauses.name: HARVEST CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If this card is played in Q1: Declare momentum.

clauses.name: DIMINISHING RETURNS EFFECT
clauses.rule: Each time this card is played: The fruit is considered higher than last time.

clauses.name: ORCHARD DEPLETION OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If no fruit remains: Propose a roadmap to grow more fruit.

witness_quote: Let's just start with the easy stuff.
